title: Vivo o muerto

actors: Manuel Capetillo, Flor Silvestre, Aldo Monti
plot: In this western, as it was said in El Redondel, Capetillo "plays the role of a courageous charro that fights with all the evildoers and for having, who falls in love with every girl that is put before him and that leaves with his ...
